headline: Evaluating Carrier Global (CARR) After Recent Share Price Move And Mixed Signals On Valuation
summary: Carrier Global stock overview Carrier Global (CARR) is back on investors’ radar after a recent price move, with the stock closing at US$59.71 and showing mixed short term performance over the week and month. See our latest analysis for Carrier Global. That recent 1 day share price return of 1.98% sits against a 30 day share price return of 4.79% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 1.12%, suggesting momentum has been steady rather than rapid.
